title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Om Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Om Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!
